chapter_title.en: True meaning of istighfār in Islam

text: وَالثَّالِثُ: أَنْ تُؤَدِّيَ إِلَى الْـمَخْلُوقِينَ حُقُوقَهُمْ حَتَّى تَلْقَى اللهَ عزّوجلّ أَمْلَسَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكَ تَبِعَةٌ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: the third is to discharge all the rights of people so that you may meet Allāh quite clean with nothing to account for;
